fields.summary: Anthropic is an artificial intelligence safety and research company that develops AI systems focused on safety, transparency, and responsible deployment. The company is known for creating Claude, an AI assistant, and has established policies around responsible scaling and AI safety including their Responsible Scaling Policy and Constitutional AI framework. They operate a trust center focused on security and compliance, and provide educational resources through Anthropic Academy.
fields.funding: not disclosed in the cited sources
fields.headcount: not disclosed in the cited sources
fields.recent_signal: not disclosed in the cited sources
